title: Russia invades Ukraine — sweeping sanctions imposed
description: Russia launches a full-scale invasion of Ukraine on February 24, 2022. The US, EU, and UK impose sweeping sanctions including SWIFT removal, asset freezes, and export controls. Brent crude surges past $130/barrel. EU natural gas prices spike 500%+. Ukraine supplies ~70% of the world's neon gas (critical for semiconductor manufacturing). Wheat and corn prices surge. Companies with Russia operations face pressure to exit.
